success.signup: Account created! We sent a confirmation email — check your inbox (and spam folder) before signing in.

errors.provisionFailed: Could not complete sign in. Please try again in a moment.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed yet. Check your inbox.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
errors.userAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Try signing in.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
errors.networkError: Connection error. Check your internet and try again.
